sonnet_review.biasedText: caps several days of escalating tensions
sonnet_review.reason: This matches my detection about the word 'caps' framing the lawsuit as the climax of a personal feud. Sonnet correctly identifies the dramatic, conflict-oriented framing.

sonnet_review.biasedText: one of the most powerful CEOs in the United States
sonnet_review.reason: This matches part of my detection about the same passage. The descriptor adds dramatic framing that implies a power struggle narrative rather than simply identifying Dimon by his role.

sonnet_review.biasedText: Most U.S. CEOs have been reluctant to publicly criticize Trump over his business and economic policies, but Dimon has spoken out against some of the president's actions
sonnet_review.reason: This aligns with my detection about the article structurally framing the lawsuit as retaliation against Dimon for criticizing Trump. The passage positions Dimon as exceptionally willing to speak out, reinforcing the retaliation narrative over the legal merits.

gpt_false_negatives.biasedText: But his suit against JPMorgan Chase and Dimon also comes after tensions between the two men escalated on several fronts. Most U.S. CEOs have been reluctant to publicly criticize Trump over his business and economic policies, but Dimon has spoken out against some of the president's actions, including his efforts to exert more control over the Federal Reserve.
gpt_false_negatives.reason: The article structurally frames the lawsuit primarily as retaliation against Dimon for criticizing Trump, de-emphasizing the stated legal basis while emphasizing the political conflict narrative. GPT missed this entirely.

gpt_false_negatives.biasedText: caps several days of escalating tensions between the president and one of the most powerful CEOs in the United States
gpt_false_negatives.reason: The word 'caps' frames the lawsuit as the climax of a personal feud rather than a standalone legal action, and 'one of the most powerful CEOs' adds dramatic framing implying a power struggle. GPT missed this.
